content.title: Healthcare Process Flow: Billing & Insurance Inquiry (Patient Support)

ss.s: Click on the phone icon when a call comes in.
Once the reason for the call has been determined, click the Patient Profile button.
And in the Interaction Notes box, enter “Patient calling about billing inquiry; unclear charge.”
Then press Ctrl+N to Save your initial notes.
Enter "Unexpected charge; patient questions insurance coverage.” in the Interaction Notes box.
And press Ctrl+N to Save the additional notes.
Click the Compliance Checklist reminder.
Review the checklist to ensure all aspects are covered.
Then press Ctrl+X to exit the pop-up.
Confirm the verification details provided in the Patient Profile & Insurance Details section.
Then click the Verify button.
A system generated message saying “Patient Verified” will appear.
Next, click the Billing Review button or press Ctrl+B.
Locate and double-click the service date as specified by the caller to expand the Line Item details.
Check the details of the procedure, then in the Interaction Notes enter "Charge located; insurance coverage reviewed."
Then to save your notes, press Ctrl+N.
Click the Eligibility Check button or press Ctrl+E to verify insurance coverage.
A System result will pop-up showing the message Service covered; patient responsibility appears incorrect.
In the Interaction Notes box, enter “Coverage confirmed; discrepancy detected.”
Then press Ctrl+N to save your notes.
Click the Create Ticket button or press Ctrl+T to initiate a ticket for the Billing review findings.
Select Insurance covered.
And from the dropdown results, select Incorrect patient charge.
Then click Submit.
A system-generated confirmation with a Reference ID will appear, indicating that the ticket has been successfully submitted.
Enter "Billing review ticket created." in the Interaction Notes box.
Then press Ctrl+N to save your notes.
Click the Send Email button.
Review your email; once everything is in order, click Send.
Document everything that transpired during the call.
Finally, press Ctrl+S to save the case and end the call.
The patient says: “I don’t think I should be billed for this service. My doctor said it was covered.” You are viewing the line item details and preparing to respond. What is the BEST next step?
